testcase.name: setup

error.message: Could not start a new session. Response code 500. Message: session not created: This version of Microsoft Edge WebDriver only supports Microsoft Edge version 137 Current browser version is 139.0.3405.102 with binary path C:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft\Edge\Application\msedge.exe Host info: host: 'DESKTOP-9U06SS2', ip: '192.168.10.11' Build info: version: '4.34.0', revision: '707dcb4246*' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.7' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.edge.EdgeDriver Command: [null, newSession {capabilities=[Capabilities {browserName: MicrosoftEdge, ms:edgeOptions: {args: [], binary: C:\Program Files (x86)\Micr..., extensions: []}}]}]
